economic_notes: Band owns investments in Ecolink Forest Services Ltd., Alkali Resource Management Ltd., Cariboo Aboriginal Forestry Enterprises Limited Partnership (50% partner), and Dog Creek Ranch Ltd. Band operates Alkali Enterprises (store). Silviculture and forestry activities noted. Rapid start housing program underway. New solid waste transfer station and wastewater upgrades in progress.
notes: Three entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): Ecolink Forest Services Ltd., Alkali Resource Management Ltd., and Cariboo Aboriginal Forestry Enterprises LP. Consolidated entity includes Band government, Investment Fund, Trust Fund, CMHC Social Housing Fund, and Treaty Self-Government Fund. Operating results of band enterprises ($1,005,156) included below the line in Statement of Operations. Segment schedule totals differ from consolidated statement of operations due to inter-entity eliminations and inclusion of enterprise revenues. Deferred revenue increased by $2,591,579 in 2024 (nil in 2023), suggesting significant funding received in advance. Daycare fees show negative amount (-$14,453). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. total_government_transfers estimated as ISC + FNHA + CMHC + CCATEC + Dept of Justice + Natural Resources + FNESC + Province of BC + BC Hydro + New Relationship Trust + FN Drinking Water Settlement.
